xterm.js — the real terminal component (ADR-010 / CC-11).

Pinned, integrity-verified external authority (Law L5) — vendored UMD builds, not
loaded from a CDN. Core + fit match the engine's CC-13 pin
(holospaces/vv/artifacts/cc13/vendor/xterm, @xterm/xterm 5.5.0); the remaining
addons are the official @xterm packages at the versions published for 5.5.0,
installed from the npm registry and committed here.

Versions:
  @xterm/xterm            5.5.0
  @xterm/addon-fit        0.10.0
  @xterm/addon-webgl      0.18.0
  @xterm/addon-web-links  0.11.0
  @xterm/addon-search     0.15.0
  @xterm/addon-unicode11  0.8.0
  @xterm/addon-clipboard  0.1.0
  @xterm/addon-serialize  0.13.0

sha256 (the bytes os.html loads):
  1f991ac3b4b283ebf96e60ae23a00a52765dd3a2e46fa6fdda9f1aab032f7495  xterm.js
  ba8e6985669488981ccf40c0cefe3aba80722cb6c92de7ad628b0bd717faf2b6  xterm.css
  bdaefa370b1bfc42ee88d46fe6072400902a4d4b2d45cd93438dda9b23c97089  addon-fit.js
  9ffa9ac3ff6d47d4e6216ed1972ca8e0b5336cef744f50ebdc3f67b0ed727cdb  addon-webgl.js
  f230a6c8211ce4614dda5441f27b603c7c1ca95151a655bc0efac6377ee643f0  addon-web-links.js
  3cf52d71d9deb4ba60125087434c53e3fb35bb2249db9b13987991fd2db1c7bd  addon-search.js
  b0c3be540a9984713aea996966c24ed1a639d11f60d44986b22661e3a8a148d0  addon-unicode11.js
  c3fe3f1e8be371c7b2034170c6a2e3cc1b9dbe6c9f1f283cbc17ff456ef78818  addon-clipboard.js
  fc432359a02f7482bdccd7b8ac46dc917c2d05ea540737900ded8d9cd150b633  addon-serialize.js

Reproduce:
  npm install @xterm/xterm@5.5.0 @xterm/addon-fit@0.10.0 @xterm/addon-webgl@0.18.0 \
    @xterm/addon-web-links@0.11.0 @xterm/addon-search@0.15.0 @xterm/addon-unicode11@0.8.0 \
    @xterm/addon-clipboard@0.1.0 @xterm/addon-serialize@0.13.0
  cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/lib/xterm.js  node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css  .
  cp node_modules/@xterm/addon-*/lib/addon-*.js .
